tweet.description: Introducing the new SOLO: now on Desktop and Web.  You define the task, review the results, and SOLO handles the rest.  SOLO is in beta, with limited-time, free access via invite codes.

Introducing Code on Canvas in @pencildev   AI design tool for Claude and Codex. Design ❤️ Code are officially in a relationship, opening new ways to create on canvas.  Ask agent to generate custom design tools inside Pencil on the fly, create interactive components, generative
